content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Erase and Extend (Hard Version)". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1537/problem/E2
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains two integers n and m, the number of elements in the array and the number of operations. The second line contains n integers, the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximum length of the subarray that can be achieved.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to track the maximum length of the subarray that can be achieved after each operation.
